description_long: This lamppost features a tall, slender vertical column with a square base for stability. At the top, a horizontal crossbar supports two lantern-style light fixtures, each suspended by a short chain or rod. The lanterns are rectangular and enclosed, suggesting a classic or traditional design. Decorative elements are visible at the top of the post and around the crossbar, adding an ornamental touch. The entire structure appears to be made of a uniform metallic material with a matte, bronze-like finish. The lamppost is designed for ground installation in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or plazas.
description: A tall, bronze-colored lamppost with two hanging rectangular lanterns and decorative elements at the top and crossbar.
description_view_0: Front view showing both lanterns hanging symmetrically from the crossbar and the decorative top finial.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the post and the depth of the lanterns, with minimal crossbar visibility.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying both lanterns and the ornamental top, with the base clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the narrow profile and lantern depth.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Rectangular lanterns with enclosed sides and a classic, suspended design.
